title: Canadian Field Epidemiology Program e-mail subscription service - Canada.ca
content:
## Canadian Field Epidemiology Program e-mail subscription service
The Public Health Agency of Canada is committed to protecting the privacy rights of individuals and safeguarding the personal information under its control in accordance with the Privacy Act . The personal information you provide will be collected by the Canadian Field Epidemiology Program within the Regulatory, Operations and Emergency Management Branch. The Canadian Field Epidemiology Program derives its authority to collect your personal information under the Public Health Agency of Canada Act and the Department of Health Act .
Why are we collecting your personal information? By providing your email address, you hereby consent to receive updates and notifications about the Canadian Field Epidemiology Program, applied epidemiology training, events, and career opportunities.
Will we use or share your personal information for any other reason? Your email address will only be used to send notifications about the Canadian Field Epidemiology Program, applied epidemiology training, events, and career opportunities. In some cases, information may be disclosed without your consent for purposes not outlined in this Statement pursuant to subsection 8(2) of the Privacy Act.
What are your rights? You have the right to access and request a correction and/or notation to your personal information. You also have a right to complain to the Privacy Commissioner of Canada if you feel your personal information has been handled improperly. For more information about these rights, or about how we handle your personal information, please contact the Canadian Field Epidemiology Program at cfep-pcet@phac-aspc.gc.ca . If you choose not to provide your email address, we won't be able to send you updates. If you are a subscriber and wish to cancel your subscription, you can unsubscribe at any time. If you unsubscribe, we'll remove your email address from our subscription list and you will no longer receive updates. If you wish to change your subscription email, you must cancel your subscription and re-subscribe
For more information: The collection of your personal information is described in Info Source at infosource.gc.ca . Refer to the Standard Personal Information Bank entitled-Public Communications (PSU 914) .

## Sign up web page for users
To receive information regarding the Canadian Field Epidemiology Program, applied epidemiology training, events, and career opportunities, please enter your e-mail address and information below, and click on the " Subscribe " button.
Required fields are marked with an asterisk ( * ).

## Change your subscription
To change your subscription email, you must unsubscribe under the previous email address and re-subscribe with the new email address.
If you wish to unsubscribe, type in your email address in the box below, then select the " Unsubscribe " button.
